properties.description: Self-export data model where users extract their own data via GDPR rights and upload it for analysis
properties.core_principle: YOU Pull, WE Read — user extracts own data, Meldar analyzes patterns

properties.description: Progressive data collection: 5-question chat → Screen Time screenshot → Browser history → Google Takeout → Additional exports
properties.principle: Each step delivers value BEFORE asking for the next

properties.description: Zero install, zero permissions, zero API, zero privacy risk. LLM vision does heavy lifting.
Zero-data entry point — personality quiz style questions mapping to validated use cases
Richest single export: Calendar, Chrome history, YouTube, Search, My Activity
User exercises GDPR Article 20 data portability rights to extract data from platforms. Meldar never touches accounts.
properties.positioning: We're the analyst, not the collector

properties.description: Right to data portability — users can receive personal data in structured, machine-readable format within one month
81% express deep concern about privacy but 88% willingly share data for personalized experiences
properties.implication: Data sharing is a calculated transaction — immediate utility outweighs abstract fears

properties.description: Three frameworks: FamilyControls, ManagedSettings, DeviceActivity. Opaque tokens, sandboxed, no network requests.
properties.limitations: Incredibly limited scope, no pickup counts, bypass via Face ID

properties.description: Passive desktop time tracker — monitors active app/URL, does NOT collect keystrokes/screenshots
Official Google API for programmatic data export. EEA only. DMA compliance. One OAuth consent for years of behavioral data.
properties.competitive_moat: EEA restriction gives Finnish company Meldar an advantage over US competitors

properties.description: Pre-made Shortcut extracts Screen Time data programmatically, sends JSON to API. One tap install.
properties.replaces: Entire vision parsing pipeline — no OCR, no language issues, daily automated data

properties.description: New tab replacement that quietly collects domain-level browsing patterns. Fills desktop gap.
properties.permissions: history + tabs = full URL history with timestamps

properties.description: Engineering strategies for extracting actionable data from messy, incomplete, real-world user inputs
properties.principle: Design for the laziest possible path to the richest possible data

properties.description: Ask for permissions only at the moment the feature needs it, not during onboarding
Deliver insight/recommendation BEFORE asking for data. Shifts framing from 'they want my data' to 'they gave me something'
Space out data requests across days/weeks. Day 0: Chat. Day 1: Screen Time. Day 3: Calendar. Day 7: Google data.
DTC telehealth — $401M revenue 2025, 250K+ customers, 2 employees, built with AI for $20K in 2 months
properties.founder: Matthew Gallagher, self-taught programmer from LA

properties.description: 800+ Facebook pages posing as individual physicians with AI-generated headshots, 5000+ concurrent ad campaigns
properties.outcome: FDA warning letter, 5 active lawsuits, data breach at clinical partner

properties.still_operating_reason: Revenue buys legal defense, regulatory machinery slow, Meta profits from spend

properties.description: Full internet marketing strategy inspired by MedVi, reviewed by 13 specialist AI agents
properties.key_decision: No fake social proof, 5-10 character brands not 100+ fakes, validate before scaling

properties.unanimous_findings: Kill fake social proof (8/13), persona farm ban risk (6/13), budget mismatch (5/13), validate before scaling (4/13), solo founder ceiling (4/13)

properties.description: Aggressive-but-legal marketing tactics achieving same psychological effects as MedVi's illegal shortcuts
properties.tactics: Character brand pages, alarming-but-real scan scores, time-limited real pricing, competitor alternative pages, engagement pods

properties.description: 16 modular AI agents covering full SEO + AEO lifecycle, built as Meldar template app
properties.revenue_model: Subscription (EUR 19-69/mo) + metered API brokerage with 50-100% markup
properties.architecture: Claude-powered Strategist plans, human approves, deterministic functions execute
properties.mvp: 5 SEO modules + Strategist Agent, 6-week timeline, zero LLM cost in MVP modules

properties.description: Building Meldar as a recognized entity for AI citation across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity
properties.finding: No tool owns 'career-specific digital footprint scan' intersection
properties.timeline: 0 citations Month 1, 5-10% citation rate at Month 3, 15-30% at Month 6-12

properties.description: Ad creative framework: Hook (threat/curiosity) → Body (reveal hidden problem) → CTA (self-discovery action)

properties.key_finding: Plan is a media buying plan, not a growth plan. Zero closed-loop growth mechanics.
properties.recommendation: Instant shareable scan scorecard, referral from Day 1, North Star metric: Weekly Scans Completed

properties.description: YouTube as primary organic channel alongside LinkedIn. 2 long-form + 5 Shorts/week. 1 video = 10-12 assets.
properties.series: I Googled You (discovery), Digital Footprint Fix (education), AI Career Intel (trend)
properties.production: 3-4 hours per video with AI tool stack ($200-300/mo)

properties.verdict: NOT READY at Week 8. Minimum 4-6 months after first paid B2C users.
properties.prerequisite: 50+ paid B2C users, 5+ real testimonials, team dashboard, GDPR DPA
properties.pricing_issue: B2C ($29/mo) higher than B2B per-seat ($15-25) — backwards

properties.finding: 500 'digital footprint for [job title]' pages scored 38/100 — DO NOT PROCEED
properties.recommendation: 10-20 free tool pages instead (Ahrefs playbook). 'Google Yourself' tool targets 40-60K monthly searches.

properties.description: Free tool + blog content + 10+ years of media coverage. Dominant AI citations (70%+ of responses).
Blacklists fake 'As seen in' logos (Annex I #4), fake reviews (Annex I #23b), fake testimonials. Follows trader's domicile.
properties.consequence: Fines to 4% annual turnover or EUR 2M

properties.description: MedVi founder, 41, self-taught programmer from LA. Previously built Watch Gang ($11M revenue, failed with 60 employees).
Content brands like 'The Hiring Insider' instead of fake people. Logos/illustrations, not AI faces. 'A Meldar Initiative' in description.

properties.verdict_for_meldar: Completely unrealistic. Use LinkedIn Matched Audiences instead.

properties.pillars: 5 content pillars: Digital Footprint, AI Career, Building in Public, Hiring Game, Vibe-Coding
properties.key_rule: No external links in post bodies — LinkedIn suppresses outbound links

properties.key_finding: Gap between creepy and safe is about WHEN you ask, WHY you ask, and whether user feels in control
properties.stat_90_pct: 90% worry about AI using data without consent (Malwarebytes 2026)
properties.stat_60_pct: 60% abandon when they discover how much data an app requests (Glance)
properties.stat_trust_rise: Trust in AI rose 16 points in one year (ARF 2025)

properties.description: Day-1 negative keyword lists prevent 25-40% budget waste. Zero mention in original plan.
properties.categories: Carbon/environmental footprint, academic/educational, criminal/legal, technical/IT, wrong-intent job queries

properties.rationale: Discovery mechanism is explicitly built on the principle that users extract their own data
GDPR Article 20 data portability rights are the legal foundation that makes self-export model possible
5-question chat is the zero-friction entry point of the trust escalation funnel
Screen Time screenshot is the second step in trust escalation after chat
Google Takeout is the deep dive step after browser history in the funnel
Trust escalation funnel is the product implementation of the progressive data collection UX pattern
Each step delivers value BEFORE asking for the next — directly implements value-before-data pattern
iOS Shortcuts automation replaces entire Screen Time screenshot + vision parsing pipeline
Data Portability API programmatically replaces manual Google Takeout for EEA users
Gen Z's calculated data sharing behavior drives the just-in-time permission design approach
MedVi used 800+ persona pages as primary acquisition lever
MedVi faces FDA warning letter, 5 active lawsuits, and regulatory exposure
Marketing blitz plan explicitly inspired by MedVi's $401M/year playbook
13 specialist agents reviewed the plan, producing consolidated findings
Edge playbook was created after agent reviews identified illegal tactics that needed legal alternatives
Edge playbook recommends character brand pages as legal alternative to fake persona pages
Character brand pages achieve similar authority effect without fake identities
MedVi's US legal shields don't apply to Meldar — UCPD follows trader's domicile (Finland)
SEO/AEO app includes 4 AEO modules (Citation Auditor, Prompt Universe Manager, Content Optimizer for AI, Entity Builder)
SEO/AEO agency app is designed as first productized app within the marketing blitz strategy
BrandYourself is identified as dominant citation competitor (70%+ of AI responses)
Growth hacker identifies plan as media buying plan, not a growth plan — missing closed-loop mechanics
Sales engineer assessment: enterprise sales at Week 8 is premature, needs B2C proof first
SEO specialist scored 500 programmatic pages at 38/100 — recommends free tools instead
Free 'Google Yourself' tool targets 40-60K monthly searches — highest-value SEO opportunity identified
YouTube elevated to primary organic channel alongside LinkedIn. Video clips become LinkedIn content.
TRR framework proposed as creative structure for all Meldar ad campaigns
iOS Shortcut identified as single highest-value shortcut — extreme effort/value ratio
Chrome extension fills desktop gap — captures the 'dark matter' of computer usage
Research consistently shows just-in-time permissions dramatically increase grant rates
ARF 2025 study found largest trust gains from clear value exchange
Zero mention of negative keywords in original plan — will burn 20-40% of budget
$30-120K/yr cost is completely unrealistic for solo-founder startup
Discovery mechanism needs robust data remediation since user-submitted data is messy and incomplete
Self-export model addresses trust concerns identified in UX research — structural impossibility of surveillance
$11.8B conversational AI market validates chat-first approach over passive tracking

properties.description: Core discovery architecture: self-export model + trust escalation funnel + data remediation engineering + UX trust patterns form the complete discovery system
MedVi case study: learn tactics → identify legal exposure → understand why shields don't apply to Meldar (EU) → create legal alternatives via edge playbook
Marketing blitz underwent 13-agent review cycle: original plan scored 3.2/10, specialist reviews identified critical flaws, produced revised plan at 7.5/10
